question: Which ten players had the most home runs in a single season? Show the player, year, team, and home run count.
sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, b.yearID, b.teamID, b.HR
FROM batting b
JOIN People p ON b.playerID = p.playerID
ORDER BY b.HR DESC
LIMIT 10

response.question: Which ten players had the most home runs in a single season? Show the player, year, team, and home run count.

question: Which teams in 2001 had a player hit more than 40 home runs? Show the team name, player name, and home run count.
sql:
SELECT t.name, p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, b.HR
FROM batting b
JOIN people p ON b.playerID = p.playerID
JOIN teams t ON b.yearID = t.yearID AND b.teamID = t.teamID
WHERE b.yearID = 2001 AND b.HR > 40

question: Which schools produced the most major league players in this dataset? Show the top 20 schools and how many players attended each school.
sql:
SELECT s.name_full, COUNT(DISTINCT cp.playerID) AS player_count
FROM CollegePlaying cp
JOIN Schools s ON cp.schoolID = s.schoolID
GROUP BY s.name_full
ORDER BY player_count DESC
LIMIT 20

question: Which players appeared in both batting and pitching records in the same year? Show the player name, year, team, batting games, and pitching games.
sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, b.yearID, b.teamID, b.G, p2.G
FROM Batting b
JOIN People p ON b.playerID = p.playerID
JOIN Pitching p2 ON b.playerID = p2.playerID AND b.yearID = p2.yearID
WHERE b.teamID = p2.teamID

question: Which franchises have had the most total wins across all seasons? Show the top 15 franchises with total wins and total losses.
sql: SELECT "teams"."franchid", "teams"."w", "teams"."l", SUM("teams"."w") AS "total_wins", SUM("teams"."l") AS "total_losses" FROM "teams" GROUP BY "teams"."franchid" ORDER BY "total_wins" DESC LIMIT 15
